entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Neurodegenerative disease; PICALM gene polymorphisms examined for susceptibility
entities.evidence: polymorphisms of the PICALM gene in susceptibility to Alzheimer's disease (AD)

entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol-binding clathrin assembly protein gene; three polymorphisms examined for AD susceptibility
entities.evidence: three polymorphisms (rs3851179, rs541458, and rs592297) of the PICALM gene

entities.name: PICALM rs3851179
entities.description: SNP in PICALM; A allele associated with decreased risk of AD (OR=0.88); significant across genetic models
entities.evidence: A carriers of rs3851179 were associated with a decreased risk of AD (OR = 0.88; 95% CI 0.84, 0.91)

entities.name: PICALM rs541458
entities.description: SNP in PICALM; C allele inversely associated with AD risk (OR=0.86); protective effect only in Caucasians
entities.evidence: C carriers of rs541458 were inversely associated with AD risk (OR = 0.86; 95% CI 0.81, 0.92)

entities.name: PICALM rs592297
entities.description: SNP in PICALM; no association with AD observed
entities.evidence: No association was observed for rs592297

relations.evidence: three polymorphisms of the PICALM gene in susceptibility to Alzheimer's disease
A carriers of rs3851179 were associated with a decreased risk of AD (OR = 0.88; 95% CI 0.84, 0.91)

properties.context: Protective; A allele OR=0.88, 20 studies, 9017 cases/15448 controls

relations.evidence: C carriers of rs541458 were inversely associated with AD risk (OR = 0.86; 95% CI 0.81, 0.92)

properties.context: Protective; C allele OR=0.86, 12 studies, 8077 cases/12022 controls; Caucasians only

relations.evidence: No association was observed for rs592297
